The Cedar Side

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the girl planning to do in the debate?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the boy say the stacked stone and timber design is better?
3QUESTION 3: What will the girl most likely do after this conversation?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen for the specific test result the boy names for each design. Identify what he says happened.
